# Page 4^page=4
HOW WE TALK⏰ The 8 AM Rule STA NDA R D F O R M AT: "WHAT — WHEN — WHY" Example: "I need milk — by 10 AM — because we are out." Important: Specifying "WHEN" helps Cody prioritize, but it is not a guarantee of the exact time. However, Cody must know "WHAT" is needed and "WHY" it is a priority for the system to move. To keep the day efficient, all requests for Cody must be entered into FamilyWall by 8 AM each morning. This allows Cody to batch errands and save gas/time. THE MONTHLY BASELINE https://qially.com/pages/familyos/ 5/3/26, 12:47 AM Page 4 of 9
